title: PPIP - Dialog after Onboarding - UI
scenario: PPIP/Data Sharing dialog appears after onboarding when tapping "Continue as Guest" on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time (fresh install or after clearing app data).
3. On the final onboarding screen, tap "Continue as Guest".
expected: A Privacy/Data Sharing (PPIP) dialog appears with the following options: \"Don't Share\" and \"Share Data\". The dialog explains that basic device and app information (model, serial number, software version, feature usage) may be collected to help improve performance and support. It states no personal information is collected and that preferences can be changed later in Settings.
